title: atenia lemmonii
intro: Atenia lemmonii, also known as Chia or Mexican chia, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. The seeds of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Atenia lemmonii is believed to provide several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and supporting heart health. The seeds can be prepared as a herbal supplement in various forms, including capsules, tea, and oil, and are also used as a nutritious additive to food products.
